personas.name: Mental Health Support User
personas.description: A person seeking to manage their mental health and mood through self-tracking and insights.
goals: Understand and track my daily moods and feelings
Find helpful insights and resources to manage my mental health
Get support and guidance for anxiety, depression, or stress
pain_points: Limited free features and locked content
Repetitive questions and limited customization options
Financial constraints for accessing premium features or therapy
context: Daily life, managing stress and emotions
Seeking mental health support and resources
constraints: Limited budget for mental health services or premium app features
Seeking free or low-cost resources for mental health support

personas.name: Mindful Maven
personas.description: A self-aware individual seeking to monitor and improve their mental well-being through a helpful app.
goals: Find a helpful resource for mental health
constraints: Seeking a good starting point for mental health

personas.name: MoodMonitor
personas.description: I want to understand and manage my emotions better.
pain_points: Trouble keeping track of my mood
Wanting to reflect on my emotional state
constraints: Needs to be easy to use
Prefers a simple and manageable way to track emotions

personas.name: Emiliana
personas.description: A person seeking emotional support and validation through a mental wellness app

personas.name: Mental Health Tracking and Support User
personas.description: A person seeking to understand and manage their mental health through self-tracking and support.
goals: Get support for mental health issues
constraints: Seeking a simple and easy-to-use solution
